Overview.description: A high-level summary of the solution, including key components such as canvas apps, workflows, screens, and environment variables.

Workflows.description: Detailed descriptions of the Power Automate workflows in the solution, including triggers, actions, connectors used, and their purpose.

Frequently Asked Questions.description: A concise list of frequently asked questions about the solution, explaining common functionality and how different components interact

Diagrams.description: Visual architecture diagrams showing the relationships between canvas apps, workflows, and environment variables.

ER Diagram.description: A structured diagram illustrating relationships between apps, screens, workflows, connectors, and environment variables within the solution.

Screen Mapping.description: A structured table of screen mappings for the solution, including their type, description, and values across development, test, and production environments.

Environment Variables.description: A structured table of environment variables used in the solution, including their type, description, and values across development, test, and production environments.

Custom document.description: A custom document that is not one of the predefined output types. Recommended for text-based documents. If you want a diagram, the output may be plain text or a text-based connection format rather than a visual diagram.
